issues: Page appears empty when no benchmark data exists - should show informative message (currently shows empty state without clear indication of why)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working: 1) Player profile has transfermarkt_url field that saves and persists, 2) Match Scores page loads correctly (shows empty when no benchmark data exists), 3) Club opportunity form has league dropdown with 15 options, 4) Admin benchmark page shows status and generate button. Benchmark generation takes 5-10 min - was not tested to avoid timeout. Test credentials: admin@soccermatch.com/admin123
